title: Google App Script?

posts.author: Taylor1430 (Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
I recently began experimenting with Google Scripts and have come up with some interesting integrations. While checking their marketplace, I found Monday.com but appears to be more about Monday.com and not integration. Can anyone advise what exactly this does:

workspace.google.com

monday.com - Google Workspace Marketplace

Manage your workload, communicate with your team, and celebrate success.

Any other thoughts on good apps to use to integrate with Monday.com?
